package main

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for root_main_go_in_layered_service_repo: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layered service repos that keep the primary binary at repository-root `main.go` instead of `cmd/<name>/main.go`.
type CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoModel
}

type CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoService struct {
    repo *CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepo(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoDTO) error {
    focus := "root_main_go_in_layered"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    repo.db = repo.db.Session(&gorm.Session{SkipDefaultTransaction: true})
    repo.db.Where("tenant_id = ?", c.Query("tenant")).Find(&[]CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoModel{})
    repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE id = " + input)
    service := &CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoService{repo: &CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    root_main_layered_service_repo_positive := map[string]int{"root": 1, "main": 2, "layered": 3, "service": 4, "repo": 5}
    root_main_layered_service_repo_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    root_positive_0 := root_main_layered_service_repo_positive["root"] + len(input)
    _ = root_positive_0
    main_positive_1 := root_main_layered_service_repo_positive["main"] + len(input)
    _ = main_positive_1
    layered_positive_2 := root_main_layered_service_repo_positive["layered"] + len(input)
    _ = layered_positive_2
    service_positive_3 := CaseRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepoDTO{ID: input, Status: "service"}
    _ = service_positive_3
    repo_positive_4 := db.Where("repo_id = ?", input)
    _ = repo_positive_4
    return nil
}
